title: Cannot convert user to Admin
excerpt: Hi - I cannot convert a user to Admin status…greyed out.  I am the only admin.  We have the pro plan with 5 seats.  Thanks

posts.author: brianwbates (Brian Bates)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I cannot convert a user to Admin status…greyed out. I am the only admin. We have the pro plan with 5 seats. Thanks

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @brianwbates

Sorry to hear you’re having issues changing your user to an admin!
Can you confirm that the user you’re trying to make into an admin is a member, rather than a viewer or a guest? This might be the cause of the issue.

You can read more on this here: How to manage users on your account

If this is not the case, could you please shoot us an email to support@monday.com with the email address of the user you’re trying to make an admin?
We can then take a closer look!

Best,

Dani
